source_note: MCP tools (mcp__magic-ui, mcp__21st-dev-magic) were permission-denied at runtime. All components written manually per fallback spec.

NumberTicker.description: Animates any positive integer from 0 to target value on scroll-into-view. Used for TrustStrip/StatsBar stats: 2300 roofs, 340 reviews, 14 years.

BlurFade.description: Blur + fade + slide-up reveal on scroll into view via framer-motion whileInView. Wrap each major page section.

AnimatedShimmer.description: Shimmer sweep overlay for hero accent elements (badges, gold text). No external deps — CSS keyframe only. Also exports GradientBorderCard for service cards.

TestimonialCard.description: Review card with 1–5 star display, reviewer initials avatar (fallback if no photo), name, location, review text, and Google Reviews badge. Brand-matched dark card.
TestimonialCard.usage: <TestimonialCard name="Sarah M." location="Cedar Park, TX" rating={5} text="Ironclad replaced our roof after the May hailstorm..." />
